case_title: ANDREW M SCHUMAN VS. DAVID B HOPPE

docket_entries.description: DISCOVERY 302, DEFENDANTS DAVID HOPPE AND OLGA DEDIKOVA'S MOTION TO COMPEL ARBITRATION AND FOR STAY OF LITIGATION WILL BE HEARD IN DEPARTMENT 302 AT 9:30 AM. JUDGE PRO TEM: OLAN C. LAMBERT; CLERK L. FONG; MATTER NOT REPORTED. (302/JPT)

LAW AND MOTION 302, RULING: ARGUED AND THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING: DEFENDANTS DAVID HOPPE AND OLGA DEDIKOVA'S MOTION TO COMPEL ARBITRATION AND FOR STAY OF LITIGATION IS GRANTED. THE APRIL 22, 2013 VOTE WAS NOT UNANIMOUS WITHIN THE MEANING OF CC&R SECTION 1.9. ARBITRATION IS REQUIRED. CC&R SECTION 3.3. THE ACTION IS STAYED. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: MARLA J. MILLER, CLERK: LESLEY FISCELLA, REPORTER: ANTHONY VAUGHN #6185.

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Arbitration And For Stay Of Litigation
Off Calendar Jun-12-2013 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: ALLAN BESBRIS, ESQ., 415.866.5000, FOR PLAINTIFF ANDREW SCHUMAN.
JAMES KRAUS, ESQ., 415.956.8100, FOR DEFENDANTS DAVID HOPPE AND OLGA DEDIKOVA.

RULING: Argued and the Court adopted its tentative ruling: defendants david hoppe and olga dedikova's Motion To Compel Arbitration And For Stay Of Litigation is granted. The April 22, 2013 vote was not unanimous within the meaning of CC&R section 1.9. Arbitration is required. CC&R section 3.3. The action is stayed. Order signed in open court. Judge: Marla J. Miller, Clerk: Lesley Fiscella, Reporter: Anthony Vaughn #6185.

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Arbitration And For Stay Of Litigation
Off Calendar Jun-12-2013 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance on this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling. Defendants DAVID HOPPE and OLGA DEDIKOVA'S Motion to Compel Arbitration and for Stay of Litigation will be heard in Department 302 at 9:30 am. Judge Pro Tem: Olan C. Lambert; Clerk L. Fong; matter not reported. (302/JPT)
